name: Cuirass of the Scarlet Arcanum
issues: Equip bonus name: screenshot shows 'Focused Burst' vs DB 'Focused Frenzy' (all three screenshots agree on 'Focused Burst')

dbEquipBonuses.name: Focused Frenzy
dbEquipBonuses.description: When you use a Daily power, for the next 30 seconds your next Encounter Power deals +75% more Damage.

name: Hauberk of the Crimson Gale
issues: Lethal Focus equip bonus: screenshot reads '+3% Power and +4% Accuracy for 7 seconds' vs DB '+3% Hit Points and +4% Accuracy for 7 seconds'

dbEquipBonuses.name: Lethal Focus
dbEquipBonuses.description: When you damage your target for more than 15% of your Maximum Hit Points in a single blow, you gain +3% Hit Points and +4% Accuracy for 7 seconds (5 second cooldown).

name: Dungeon Raider's Hide
issues: Equip bonus description in DB is abbreviated ('When damaged for more than 10% of Max HP in a single blow, gain 5% Defense for 10s') vs full in-game text ('Whenever you are damaged for more than 10% of your Maximum Hit Points in a single blow, you gain 5% Defense for 10 seconds') — functional match, flagged for completeness only

dbEquipBonuses.name: Warden's Defense
dbEquipBonuses.description: When damaged for more than 10% of Max HP in a single blow, gain 5% Defense for 10s.

name: Ultraviolet Elven Vest
issues: Equip bonus cooldown: screenshot shows '30 second cooldown', DB description says '10 second cooldown'

dbEquipBonuses.name: Focused Daily
dbEquipBonuses.description: When you use a Daily power, your next encounter power will deal 20% more damage. (10 second cooldown). Additionally, when Focused Daily triggers, you gain 2.5% Critical Severity for 10s.

name: Wintermarked Lifeward Cuirass
issues: Equip bonus max-stack text: screenshot shows '+5.5% Power and +3.5% Critical Severity', DB description says '+5.5% Power and +5.5% Critical Severity'

dbEquipBonuses.name: Unbroken Strength
dbEquipBonuses.description: For each second you are at maximum health, gain +0.55% Power and +0.55% Critical Severity. Each second at less than maximum health, you lose 3 stacks. Max 10 Stacks: +5.5% Power and +5.5% Critical Severity.

name: Forest Guardian's Raid Coif
issues: Equip bonus Fey Hunter description: screenshot '+5% Damage in all of Sharandar.' vs DB '+3% Damage in all of Sharandar.'

name: Helm of the Scarlet Arcanum

dbEquipBonuses.name: Steady Henson
dbEquipBonuses.description: For every 8 seconds you are in combat, gain +1% Accuracy and +0.3% Recharge Speed. Max 7 Stacks: +7% Accuracy and +2.1% Recharge Speed.
